allow: Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/business-units echo "" echo "=== POST valid ===")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/business-units -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"Test","moduleId":"retail-general","invoicePrefix":"C"}' echo "" echo "=== POST invalid moduleId ===")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/business-units -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"Test","moduleId":"modulo-inexistente"}' echo "" echo "=== PATCH /api/config ===")
Bash(curl -s -X PATCH http://localhost:3001/api/config -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"businessName":"Espacio BIP","cuit":"20000000000"}' echo "" kill %1)
Bash(sqlite3 localpos.db "SELECT id, name, isActive FROM business_units;")
